codeReview.summary: The playbook browse and detail pages are fully implemented according to the feature requirements. The implementation includes: /playbooks page with playbook card grid, filter controls for CC/target/major, empty state handling, and Share Your Story CTA. /playbooks/[id] detail page shows full information including CC→target path, verification badges, semester-by-semester breakdown with courses/units/grades, highlighted failure events with resolution descriptions, tips section, and Share Your Story CTA. The code follows existing patterns and conventions.

summary: Feature playbook-browse-and-detail is fully implemented and meets all requirements. The /playbooks page displays playbook cards with CC, target school, major, transfer year, and verification badges. Filter controls work for CC, target school, and major (including combinations). Empty state displays when no playbooks match. Verified playbooks show green 'Verified' badge; unverified show orange 'Inspiration only' badge. /playbooks/[id] shows full detail with semester-by-semester breakdown, highlighted failure events with resolutions, and Share Your Story CTA. Navigation from plan view to playbooks and back works via the header navigation. All 219 tests pass, typecheck clean, lint clean.
